creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
As explained in the 'customtemplates' bug: this work is blocked on switching our deployment of bugzilla directly from the port, to the git clone we have in place.   This isn't much work but has to be done carefully.

My computer has been out of commission for a bit, and I'm not expecting it to return back for at least 2 weeks.

If needed, I can walk someone through the necessary steps though.
